privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real open-source San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5) from UDST. Independent analysis of the HDF5 data confirms there are exactly 190 zones containing a total of 225,439 jobs. Applying the requested mean+std employment density threshold correctly identifies exactly 7 employment subcenters. A Zipf rank-size log-log OLS regression of these 7 subcenters yields a Zipf exponent of approximately -1.1855 with an R-squared of 0.7546. The expected output and script paths precisely match the environment configuration and verifier expectations.
